offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late commission reports. We consolidate sales data instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in consolidating sales data and calculating commissions accurately.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try weekly commission reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Update weekly in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing sales data
